narrative:
Fremont City 2-C (precinct in Sandusky County) has 627 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
